event_comments:
Teams in which one person ran more than one leg are unofficial teams and are noted as such.
Note that if a person ran more than one leg, they were only counted on the first leg that they ran.
cumulative_event_comments:
Teams in which one person ran more than one leg are unofficial teams and are noted as such.
Note that if a person ran more than one leg, they were only counted on the first leg that they ran.
